title: Progression More
description: A mod that adds More to Progression and alternate paths to it.
body:
**Trailer:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/h4sCfn5033I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**A mod That adds a lot of features like:**
- New Dimension
- Boss
- Mobs
- Gadgets
- Ores
- Armor & Tools
- Wands
- Efects on full armors
- Shield Nerf
- Blocks
- New Wood
- Upgraded Crafting, Repender, Bander, Crusher, Topaz Reactor
- Energy Capsules

**Hints:**

- ![Hint 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ffd6d026dfbc5f9bc4e52ef7dc0334eded57886.png)
- ![Hint 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d40710c256cbecf1d4eec34b60054c895c0ceea.png)
- ![Hint 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91f9639dc8db106e0716a898e0056225ce9ab83a.png)
It's recomended to play it with **JEI** mod
